Open(Func<NodeHandle>, Func<Element>, FlyoutPlacement, PopupOptions) 

OverlayHandle Open(Func<NodeHandle> anchor, Func<Element> content, FlyoutPlacement placement, PopupOptions options)

Parameters

anchor Func<NodeHandle>
content Func<Element>
placement FlyoutPlacement
options PopupOptions

Returns

OverlayHandle

OpenAt(Func<RectF>, Func<Element>, FlyoutPlacement, PopupOptions, Func<NodeHandle>?)

Open anchored to an arbitrary window-DIP RECT instead of a scene node — pointer-relative placement (ToolTip PlacementMode.Mouse, context menus at the right-tap point). owner (optional) is the logical owner node, used only to resolve the nested-overlay parent chain for cascade close.

OverlayHandle OpenAt(Func<RectF> anchorRect, Func<Element> content, FlyoutPlacement placement, PopupOptions options = default, Func<NodeHandle>? owner = null)

Parameters

anchorRect Func<RectF>
content Func<Element>
placement FlyoutPlacement
options PopupOptions
owner Func<NodeHandle>

Returns

OverlayHandle
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
